metadata.name: market-neutral-stat-arb-cmc-gate
metadata.description: BTC/ETH lead-lag statistical arbitrage with a CoinMarketCap risk-off entry gate. Deterministic z-score rules; market-neutral capital preservation with sub-0.1%-of-capital live drawdown.

signal.definition: rolling z-score of log(BTC/ETH) price ratio

rules.entry: z < -2.0  (ETH cheap vs BTC relative to recent ratio)
rules.cost_basis: live paper PnL is gross (no gas/slippage); the bundled backtest applies 0.3% round-trip per leg

strategy.param_source: live stat_arb_pairs DB row BTC_ETH_LEAD_LAG_BASE (authoritative — drove the live paper trades)

cmc_gate.rule: on CMC bear_trending (risk-off), pause NEW entries; exits always run (entry-only)
cmc_gate.source: CoinMarketCap market-regime signal (live deriveRegimeFromRestData + cmcRegimeIsRiskOff mapping; risk-off <=> bear_trending)
cmc_gate.reconstructed_history_note: CMC historical regime is paywalled. For the backtest, the per-bar verdict is RECONSTRUCTED from the real BTC 7-day trend (Binance OHLCV) using the live threshold cut-points (-10% -> bear_trending, +5% -> bull_trending); btc_dominance approximated >55, total_market_cap_change unavailable.

risk_limits.accounting: measured-only — pricing-fallback (unmeasured) closes excluded from all metrics

backtest_metrics.gate_effect: loss reduced ~46% (-$185.95 -> -$99.51); max drawdown reduced ~45% (0.393% -> 0.216% of capital); 17 entries paused incl. the single largest loss -$61.99 (entry 2026-06-03 21:40Z); per-trade Sharpe falls (-0.2783 -> -0.4318) — the gate cuts exposure, not per-trade quality

live_track_record.source: paper_positions (status=Closed), Stat Arb measured column, measured-only

disclosures.loss_reduction_not_profit: the CMC gate reduces loss and drawdown in the crash window; it does not turn the strategy profitable in that window
disclosures.reconstructed_cmc_history: backtest CMC regime is reconstructed from real BTC 7d trend, not real CMC historical data (paywalled)
disclosures.near_breakeven_market_neutral: live record is near-breakeven by design — market-neutral capital preservation, not alpha generation
disclosures.slice_only: this is a self-contained slice; the learning loop and live execution engine are NOT included

sponsor_stacks.coinmarketcap: market-regime risk-off gate + live token-safety gating + regime confidence modifier + performance benchmark
sponsor_stacks.bnb_chain_aster: Aster perp venue for the delta-neutral V2B variant

reproduce.command: cd backtest && npm install && npm run backtest
